experience.description: During a 3-month internship, I worked with the company's internal HR data to deliver actionable insights through the full data workflow — from raw data to visual storytelling. I cleaned and standardized messy HR datasets using Pandas, handling missing values, duplicates, and inconsistent formatting, then conducted in-depth analysis of workforce metrics such as headcount, turnover, and department distribution. Finally, I designed clear visualizations using Matplotlib to communicate findings to non-technical stakeholders. Tools: Python · Pandas · Matplotlib

education.school: Da Nang University of Economics( DUE)
